snippet.title: Watch NASAтАЩs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover тАУ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space тАУ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAтАЩs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32тАЩ to tie at one and added two more in the 65тАЩ and 85тАЩ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70тАЩ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27тАЩ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanтАЩs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

About HBO Max: 
HBO Max is WarnerMediaтАЩs direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMediaтАЩs rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Dodge Challenger Demon v Porsche 911 Turbo S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

ItтАЩs time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

MatтАЩs in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and heтАЩs lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isnтАЩt the first time weтАЩve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know youтАЩre pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

YouтАЩll have to keep watching to find out!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us the Dodge - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

YouтАЩll have to keep watching to find out!

All three of these contenders can produce a serious amount of power. First up weтАЩve got Mat in his RS6, which is powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 and can put down 600hp & 800Nm of torque. And then finally we have the AMG E63 S, which is housing a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which produces 612hp and 850Nm.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong тАУ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
┬а
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, тАЬGodzilla vs. Kong,тАЭ the next epic adventure in LegendaryтАЩs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in тАЬGodzilla vs. KongтАЭ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansтАФinstigated by unseen forcesтАФis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg├еrd (тАЬBig Little Lies,тАЭ тАЬThe Little Drummer GirlтАЭ), Millie Bobby Brown (тАЬStranger ThingsтАЭ), Rebecca Hall (тАЬChristine,тАЭ тАЬProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenтАЭ), Brian Tyree Henry (тАЬJoker,тАЭ тАЬSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseтАЭ), Shun Oguri (тАЬWeathering with YouтАЭ), Eiza Gonz├бlez (тАЬFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawтАЭ), Julian Dennison (тАЬDeadpool 2тАЭ), with Kyle Chandler (тАЬGodzilla: King of the MonstersтАЭ) and Demi├бn Bichir (тАЬThe Nun,тАЭ тАЬThe Hateful EightтАЭ).
Wingard (тАЬThe Guest,тАЭ тАЬYouтАЩre NextтАЭ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (тАЬThor: RagnarokтАЭ) and Max Borenstein (тАЬGodzilla: King of the Monsters,тАЭ тАЬKong: Skull IslandтАЭ), story by Terry Rossio (тАЬPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesтАЭ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (тАЬGodzilla: King of the MonstersтАЭ), based on the character тАЬGodzillaтАЭ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorтАЩs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (тАЬThe Mummy,тАЭ тАЬWorld War ZтАЭ), production designers Owen Paterson (тАЬJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,тАЭ тАЬGodzillaтАЭ) and Thomas S. Hammock (тАЬBlair WitchтАЭ), editor Josh Schaeffer (тАЬGodzilla: King of the MonstersтАЭ), costume designer Ann Foley (тАЬSkyscraperтАЭ) and visual effects supervisor John тАЬDJтАЭ DesJardin (upcoming тАЬZack SnyderтАЩs Justice LeagueтАЭ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, тАЬGodzilla vs. Kong.тАЭ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceXтАЩs second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee тАУ approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipтАЩs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: DOELPUNTRIJKE SLOTFASE! ЁЯШ▒ | Leicester City vs Liverpool | Premier League 2020/21 | Samenvatting
snippet.description:

Landskampioen Liverpool dat met maar liefst 18 punten voorsprong kampioen is geworden is the one to beat dit seizoen! Na dertig jaar wist Liverpool eindelijk weer de titel te pakken. En hoe vergaat het Donny van der Beek bij zijn nieuwe club Manchester United?

snippet.title: F1 Netflix | Formula 1: Drive to Survive Season 3 | Teaser
snippet.description:
Coming globally to Netflix on March 19...

In a year like no other, F1 witness a unique, unforgettable season - and Netflix were there to capture every raw moment of triumph and heartbreak, every dramatic twist and turn. 

Go inside the fastest sport in the world like never before. From the producers of Senna, Amy and Diego Maradona, Drive to Survive returns for a 10-part third series on March 19. For previous series visit

When Toni (Vanessa Morgan) catches him up on whatтАЩs been going on, Archie reaches out to the rest of the gang to return home. snippet.title: There is an EVIL PIG in our HOUSE - Surprising Piggy IRL to Host Game Night
snippet.description:
First Rebecca Zamolo played Among Us In Real Life But Best Friend Jester Vs Imposter Mod. Before that Matt and Rebecca uploaded Surprising My Wife with 10,000 Roses in Our Pool for Valentines Day - Emotional.  Finally the Game Master Network made Hello Neighbor in Real Life to Win Game Night.  Now everyone on the squad wakes up in separate rooms and need to find a way to get out.  It's surprising how we all wake up.  If we can escape and find the victory coin before the evil pig from piggy in roblox we can win.  Who is this mysterious person planning all of this?  It is really like a video game irl right now.  Maybe next we will play fortnite or minecraft?  The possibilities are endless just like the endless run.  Oh no, will it be an endless run?  Maybe it was the game master who did this and can help us escape.  We have seen other youtubers do a vlog like this but it wasn't this funny.  What if one of us turns into a piggy?  Roblox was never this scary but this popular game gives me the creepy creeps.  Can we escape roblox or this evil pig in our house?  Thanks for watching my funny entertainment mystery vlog videos in 2021. 

Download the Game Master Network App
Apple Store - https://apps.apple.com/us/app/id1519507088
Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.gamemasters.dev.rebeccasrun

snippet.title: I am so confused.
snippet.description:
Schlatt wonders why his last video got 80,000 comments.

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jschlatt

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/jschlatt

Truly disgusting, that some people would do this horrible thing. Why? Why did you comment this? Are you part of the problem? No, I'll tell you what the problem is. The problem is that TommyInnit and the Dream SMP are getting more viewers than me even though I'm so much cooler than everyone else on it (like Ranboo, Awesamdude, Karl Jacobs, and others whose names I forgot). Tubbo is pretty cool I guess though. Schlatt talks about why his latest video got 80,000 comments, which is insane and almost seems like algorithm manipulation (CC: Spiffing Brit). Almost as bad as the algorithm manipulation that writing these meaningless paragraphs contributes to. But hey I'm in it for the money. ToaLegend makes an appearance as well, with his hit classic "Nibble" which will now get millions of comments I bet. Please be nice.

snippet.title: 2 KOTSE AT LIMPAK-LIMPAK NA PERA, IPINAMUDMOD NG OFW SA KANYANG PRETTY GF!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!

Check out everything you need to know about these rallycross cars: https://www.rallycrossbrx.com/news/5nations-brx-put-to-the-test-by-carwow
.............................................................

Evolve's BMW M5 is BACK, and it's going up against three rallycross superstars! 

We've all seen what this incredible M5 can do, with its tuned 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 able to produce 1000hp! As for the rallycars? Well, none of them can match the power of the M5, with the lead competitor being the MINI with a 2-litre turbocharged petrol engine that can put down 600hp & 1,000Nm! 

However, the M5 has one major disadvantage compared to the competition... It weighs in at 2 tonnes, while all three rallycross cars come in at just 1,300kg! 

So what do you think - is the M5 now the underdog?! Mat & Yianni have joined forces to see if they can take down these superstars, and all we know is, this race isn't to be missed!! 

.............................................................

snippet.title: India lower order frustrates Aussies with Test evenly poised | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
A 123-run partnership between Washington Sundar and Shardul Thakur saw India bowled out just 33 runs short of Australia's first innings, with Josh Hazlewood claiming a five-wicket haul, before Australia's openers extended their lead to 54 by stumps.

snippet.title: DATING AKTOR NA NAKULONG DAHIL SA RAPE, WALA RAW SALA SABI NG BIKTIMA.
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!
